catalogData.name: Horror
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Animate Body
powers.raw: Animate Body (Complex Action, Sustained 10 minutes): Spirit enters and animates dead body. Retain stats, but damage taken is applied to body first.
powers.text: Spirit enters and animates dead body. Retain stats, but damage taken is applied to body first.

powers.name: Cast Spell
powers.raw: Cast Spell (Complex Action): Cast Acid Stream at Force/2

powers.name: Horrify
powers.raw: Horrify (Complex Action, Special): Cast Bugs (sustained) or Spook (not sustained) at Force. Can't target same person twice.
powers.text: Cast Bugs (sustained) or Spook (not sustained) at Force. Can't target same person twice.

powers.name: Magnify Pain
powers.raw: Magnify Pain (Minor Action, Sustained 1 minute): Reduce target's Wounded Limit to 1. Resist: WIL+BOD
powers.text: Reduce target's Wounded Limit to 1. Resist: WIL+BOD

powers.name: Terrifying Appearance
powers.raw: Terrifying Appearance (Complex Action, Sustained): Materialize to physical plane and cast Terrify at Force
powers.text: Materialize to physical plane and cast Terrify at Force

powers.name: Unnerve
powers.raw: Unnerve (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +Force/2 on tests to interrogate captive target
powers.text: Target gains +Force/2 on tests to interrogate captive target

greatFormPowers.name: Waking Dream
greatFormPowers.raw: Waking Dream (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
